published.text:
### Hero
Heading: Booking Confirmation and Reminder Automation
Body: You book the appointment. The customer confirms. Then they forget, double-book, or just do not show up. No-shows cost service businesses thousands per month in lost revenue and wasted time slots. Booking confirmation and reminder automation sends the right messages at the right times — confirmation immediately, reminder the day before, final reminder the morning of — and gives customers an easy way to reschedule instead of ghosting.
Sub: Below: what a proper confirmation and reminder system looks like, how it reduces no-shows, and what kind of businesses benefit most.

### Core sections
- What a confirmation and reminder system includes
- How reminder timing affects no-show rates (prose with data)
- ROI of booking reminders

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers about booking confirmation and reminder automation

### Final CTA
Heading: Stop losing revenue to no-shows
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at your current no-show rate, estimate what it is costing you, and map out a reminder system that fits your workflow.

edits.description: Published as part of batch 3. Paired with no-show-reduction page for scheduling cluster.
Walks through timing science: 24-hour, same-day, and active confirmation vs passive reminder.
Interlinks to AI appointment setter, no-show reduction, and client onboarding.
Practical pricing at the end ($1K-$4K range). Transparent, no upsell language.
